title: 有馬記念の後に・うそみたい

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan finishes the race so drained she
can't even speak. And yet, victory remained out
of reach.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her rivals, on the other hand, have the energy to
chat away about things she can't understand. It's
like they live in a different world.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She feels that she's not as smart or capable as her
friends, and that all my efforts amounted to no
good because of her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Convinced that she's a dummy—a dummy so
dumb she didn't even realize how dumb she
was—Jordan lets out a bitter laugh.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She doesn't want to embarrass herself anymore. I
have the Osaka Hai in mind for her next goal, but
she runs from training.
